iot.jobtemplate.rateincreasecriteria.Cfn: Allows you to define a criteria to initiate the increase in rate of rollout for a job.

iot.jobtemplate.rateincreasecriteria.Num.Description: The threshold for number of notified things that will initiate the increase in rate of rollout.
The threshold for number of succeeded things that will initiate the increase in rate of rollout.
